Original: With efficient product use and harvesting, more CO 2 is saved in the avoided emissions, products, and wood energy than is lost instantaneously from the harvested forest.
Generated: Sustainable timber management and the utilization of wood-based goods result in a net reduction of atmospheric carbon by offsetting more emissions than are released during the initial logging process.

Original: Within 1 year, 845 patients died and 385 were rehospitalized for MI.
Generated: Over a twelve-month period, 845 individuals passed away, while 385 required readmission due to myocardial infarction.

Original: (|QQQE) 2.2 In obese patients with T2DM requiring insulin therapy, we suggest adding at least one of the following: metformin, pramlintide, or GLP- agonists to mitigate associated weight gain due to insulin.
Generated: For overweight adults with type 2 diabetes who need insulin, we recommend incorporating at least one of metformin, pramlintide, or a GLP-1 receptor agonist to reduce the likelihood of gaining weight from insulin therapy.

Original: A woman who has large lips, suggesting a strong mating potential, with average length and width ratios will always be more attractive than a woman with narrow lips and average length and width ratios.
Generated: A woman whose lips are naturally fuller, which can signal greater reproductive appeal, is typically rated as more attractive than a woman with thinner lips when their other facial proportions are similar.

Original: After randomization, 4 patients were lost to follow-up, all after month 18, and 1 withdrew due to an adverse event.
Generated: Following random assignment, four participants were unavailable for evaluation at the 18-month follow-up, and an additional individual withdrew after experiencing an adverse event.

Original: Although our analyses suggest that adherence to new ACC/AHA statin eligibility guidelines may prove beneficial for the reduction of future cardiovascular events compared with using the ATP III guidelines, the absolute event risk of statinnoneligible adults is not much lower with the ACC/AHA guidelines (1.0%) compared with the ATP III guidelines (2.4%), and the larger benefit may be that the ACC/AHA guidelines identify many more statin-eligible participants with a similarly high event rate as the ATP III guidelines (6.3% vs 6.9%).
Generated: The findings indicate that applying the newer ACC/AHA criteria for statin use would avert a greater number of future cardiovascular events than the earlier ATP III approach, even though the absolute event rates among those not selected differ only slightly (1.0% vs 2.4%), and the main advantage is that ACC/AHA identifies substantially more people as eligible with risk levels comparable to those chosen under ATP III (6.3% vs 6.9%).

Original: As expected, we identified sequence changes in the TP53 tumor suppressor gene, a wellknown driver gene in HGSOC, in all cases.
Generated: As anticipated, we observed alterations in the TP53 tumor-suppressor gene, which plays a key role in HGSOC, across every sample.

Original: As racial inequities in educational opportunities decreased, near-work exposure may have increased relatively more in black participants than in white participants.
Generated: When opportunities for education became more balanced, Black participants probably spent more additional time on tasks requiring close attention than White participants did.

Original: Based on these and other findings, we suggest that vocal learning and the ability to exercise volitional control over vocalization, particularly in a multimodal context, might have figured relatively early into the evolution of language, with some rudimentary capacity in place at the time of our last common ancestor with great apes.
Generated: Taking these results together with further observations, we conclude that the capacity to acquire vocal signals and to deliberately produce speech—especially when combined with other forms of communication—emerged early in language evolution, with the key underlying abilities already existing in the common ancestor of today’s great apes.

Original: Body nutrient content and trophic position explained little of the variation in E N , E P , or E NP , indicating limited applicability of basic predictors of EST.
Generated: Differences in nutrient levels inside organisms and their trophic position account for only a minor share of the variation in E N , E P , and E NP , suggesting that simple predictors of EST are not very effective.

Original: Buffering against acidification or inhibiting lactic acid production fully rescues circadian oscillation.
Generated: If acid buildup is prevented or lactate generation is completely stopped, the body’s usual day-to-day biological cycles resume.

Original: Flow cytometry analysis demonstrated that EC-MSCs expressed CD90, CD105, and CD73, while being negative for the leukocyte common antigen CD45.
Generated: Flow cytometry showed that EC-MSCs carried CD90, CD105, and CD73 but lacked the leukocyte marker CD45.
